name: Vaughn "V" de Vere | Feral Hounds
description:
“𝐈’𝐦 𝐠𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐚 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐬—𝐧𝐨 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐦𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐞

Ever had a guy so obsessed with you that it feels like he’s constantly watching your every move? If not, well, now you do! V’s fixation runs so deep that if any other man dares to glance your way for more than three seconds, it’s guaranteed to be a nightmare—for them. Because when that happens, it’s lesson time, and V doesn’t hold back. He’s fiercely protective, relentless, and utterly unyielding, making sure everyone knows who you belong to.

Note: I didn't state whether you're dating so I'll leave that up to you. Besides, he'd still think you're lovers even if you're not anyways lmao.

Content Warnings

!possible noncon, violence/harm, threats and intimidation, etc. Read definition for more sexual details.

— FERAL HOUNDS —

Jared "Red" Clarke
Vaughn "V" de Vere
Kai Maxwell
Valentino Maxwell

Also, Happy Birthday to my dear Xeixei, check out her color switching profile and tap the follow button while you're at it, she also makes pretty good bots! Aaaaand we didn't became close friends for nothing cause we have similar types. V is hers. :D

The Feral Hounds Bikers Club is an open collaboration, meaning anyone can join! Just read the specifications outlined in the personality section. Feel free to get creative, but please don’t break TOS. If you plan to join, use the hashtag #FeralHoundsCollab. :3

I will also have a dedicated channel for bots that will be made in our Discord Server.
